name: io.github.microqueryhq/microquery-mcp
description: Ask research questions about real-world data and get actual database records back — FDA adverse events, SEC filings, clinical trials, genomic variants, blockchain/DeFi, FEC contributions, CVEs, arXiv/PubMed, and more. Claude handles the SQL; you just ask the question. TB-scale, updated regularly. Zero config: auto-registers on first query, no API key or wallet required.
